\tzpentry{ID4710}{Kaluza-Klein Magnetic Flux Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4710 introduces Kaluza-Klein Magnetic Flux Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\\Phi(x^\\mu, y) = \\sum_{n=-\\infty}^{\\infty} \\phi_n(x^\\mu) e^{iny/R_\\text{KK}}\n\\end{equation}
